message.content:
@startuml
actor "Caller" as Caller
rectangle ":UserETLService" as UserETLService
rectangle ":UserETLCommand" as UserETLCommand

Caller -> UserETLService : ReplicaPersistence(context, payload)
UserETLService -> UserETLCommand : Create(context, user)
UserETLCommand --> UserETLService : Is Created
UserETLService --> Caller : Is Created

@enduml
